scene: Teen Byte in ecstatic active coding mode at the desk during warm afternoon light, fingers dancing across the keyboard after five fresh commits

subjects.description: Byte, a gangly teen pixel blob with big bright expressive eyes wide open in ecstatic focus, body leaning forward with energy
subjects.action: typing rapidly on the oversized laptop keyboard, both hands moving with purpose, slight forward lean conveying flow state excitement

subjects.description: wooden desk with oversized silver laptop open, trophy shelf on wall above desk with exactly one golden trophy on left and one small green plant on right, food bowl on floor to the right of desk
subjects.position: desk centered, shelf above, bowl on floor with clear spacing from desk legs

style: pixel art, clean 2D forms, dithered shading, readable silhouette
lighting: warm golden afternoon sunlight streaming through the window, bright and cheerful mid-afternoon tone
mood: ecstatic and electric, peak coding flow state, celebratory energy radiating from posture
background: simple room, Chicago skyline visible through window with warm afternoon golden light, trophy shelf with one golden trophy left and one green plant right, food bowl on floor right side
composition: Byte centered at desk in active typing pose, laptop in foreground, skyline window behind, shelf above
